rationale: Treat the Open DC Alcoholic Beverage and Cannabis Board row as a source shadow of canonical DCGIS board 26 for this alpha. Both rows describe the board associated with the Alcoholic Beverage and Cannabis Administration and cite D.C. Code § 25-201, so publishing both creates a duplicate public-body node. Keep the DCGIS board as the canonical public body and preserve the Open DC evidence through this audited suppression.
